features: Dove Men+Care Cleanse+Care Body Wash & Socks Gift Set features a full-size Dove Men+Care body wash and a pair of exclusive ankle socks
Dove Men+Care Hydrating Clean Comfort 3-in-1 Hair, Face & Body Wash 250 ml contains 24-hour MicroMoisture technology that nourishes the skin continuously throughout the day
Features a fresh lemon and cedarwood fragrance to leave him feeling positive and re-energised
Dove Men+Care socks included in our gift set are the perfect way for your stylish man to add a subtle pattern to any outfit
These gifts for men are packaged in a ready-to-give cracker-shaped box
Treat your family and friends to this Dove Men+Care gift set – perfect for any occasion
description: Product Description Looking for something special for a man who likes to take great care of himself? Look no further than the Dove Men+Care Cleanse+Care Body Wash & Socks Gift Set. Because we believe that care makes a man stronger, this set of gifts for men includes a full-size Dove Men+Care Hydrating Clean Comfort 3-in-1 Hair, Body & Face Wash (250 ml) and a pair of chunky socks (in size 7–11) that team up to protect his skin and keep him stylish and comfortable all day. Not only does the body wash leave him feeling re-energised with an invigorating masculine scent, but it also acts as a moisturiser thanks to 24-hour MicroMoisture technology, providing continuous nourishment throughout the day and giving him healthier, smoother skin after just one shower. Plus, it saves space in his bathroom or sports bag. Help him feel his best no matter the occasion with Dove Men+Care. By bringing you this gift set, we celebrate a new definition of strength: one with care at its centre. Packaged in a stylish cracker-shaped box, it’s the perfect stocking filler, birthday treat or all-year-round gift. Our gift sets are engineered for men, so you know he’ll have comfortable, cared-for skin that’s reliably fresh all day. Ingredients Dove Men + Care Clean Comfort Bodywash 250ml INGREDIENTS: Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Sodium Chloride, Acrylates Copolymer, Sodium Lauroyl Isethionate, Parfum, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Hydroxide, Stearic Acid, Lauric Acid, Hydroxystearic Acid, Palmitic Acid, Tetrasodium EDTA, Sodium Isethionate, Citric Acid, PPG-6, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Amyl Salicylate, Benzyl Salicylate, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, CI 17200, CI 19140, CI 42090. Directions Massage a generous amount of Dove Men+Care Hydrating Clean Comfort 3-in-1 Hair, Face & Body Wash onto wet skin. Lather and rinse thoroughly. Use daily or as needed. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
